changelog: v4.1 (calm tune): negative absolute-momentum hurdle (0 -> -0.03) — the cash gate fires more readily, so the book steps aside sooner. Distinctly calmer Preserve: worst-12mo -8.3 -> -6.6%, Copley 1.71 -> 2.10, maxDD flat (-17.8%), for -0.5pp CAGR (14.3 -> 13.8%). Wins outright in the 2008 crisis (13.7/-5.3/Copley 2.59) and beats 60/40 in both sub-period halves. Part of the ETF-only consolidation — pairs with ETF-G v3.9 to place the two products at distinct frontier points.
